info.title: 3dfix
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Jon Gallant
-i, --input      Required. The absolute path to the 3d file to fix.
-o, --output     The absolute path to the fixed 3d file to output. Defaults to
appending '_fixed' to the InputFile file name.
-v, --verbose    Set to true to enable extended output.
--help           Display this help screen.
--version        Display version information.

options.name: --input
options.description: Required. The absolute path to the 3d file to fix.

options.name: --output
options.description:
The absolute path to the fixed 3d file to output. Defaults to
appending '_fixed' to the InputFile file name.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Set to true to enable extended output.
